title: zantedeschia occulta
intro: Zantedeschia occulta, also known as the Arum Lily or Calla Lily, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Zantedeschia genus. The plant's underground tubers have been traditionally used in traditional medicine, where they exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Zantedeschia occulta have been found to offer health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and gout. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and ground into a powder, which can be used in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
